items.name_en: 【Celebrity Favorite】🔥Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse New Clutch 👜The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design 💄with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile 😍Can be carried as a clutch 🧸or worn with the donut ⛓chain as a shoulder bag or with the leather strap as a crossbody. 👛This version is made of soft Nappa leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable adjustable leather strap *Removable donut chain with Anagram embossed pebbled texture* Discreet magnetic closure *Suede lining* 🫶🏼L0💋EWE Gold or Silver Plating🤍
